pages.text: The $(flesh)Digester$() is biomancy's stomach. Feed it food or organic matter and it renders the lot down into $(l:3_machines/nutrients)Nutrient Paste$() — the fuel everything else burns.
pages.title: The Digester

pages.text: The $(flesh)Digester$() is grown only in the $(l:3_machines/bio_forge)Bio-Forge$() — there is no bench recipe. It takes a Living Flesh core, flesh bits, bone fragments, elastic fibres and $(italic)Bile$(). The recipe viewer shows the exact part cost.

$(bold)What to feed it.$() Almost anything edible or organic — crops, meat, scraps, even oddments from other mods carry digesting values. Each input lists a Nutrient yield and a processing time in the recipe viewer.$(br2)$(bold)A standing tip:$() route a farm's overflow, or a mob farm's drops, straight into the Digester. Nutrients are cheap to make in bulk and you will always want more.
pages.title: Its Diet
